name: Impersonation Notice
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Shows a persistent top-of-app banner when the active session is a Stalwart master-user impersonation (username contains '%'), with a configurable 'Return to platform' button. Detection is automatic; admins configure the platform return URL and banner styling.

returnUrl.label: Platform return URL
returnUrl.description: URL the 'Back to platform' button opens. Leave blank to hide the button. Example: https://platform.example.com/admin

returnLabel.label: Button label
returnLabel.description: Text shown on the return-to-platform button.

bannerBackground.label: Banner background (light mode)
bannerBackground.description: Any CSS colour. Used as the strip background in light mode. Defaults to the Bulwark primary blue.

bannerBackgroundDark.label: Banner background (dark mode)
bannerBackgroundDark.description: Any CSS colour. Used when the SPA is in dark mode. Defaults to a deeper blue that integrates with dark surfaces.

bannerForeground.label: Banner text colour
bannerForeground.description: Any CSS colour. Used for the strip text and icon.

actorRoleLabel.label: Actor role label
actorRoleLabel.description: Label appended after the mailbox in the banner copy. Example: 'as Platform-Admin' renders 'You are viewing alice@example.test as Platform-Admin'.
